content.full_text:
January 10, 2001

Michael A. Hilber  
4480 Price Avenue  
Santa Rosa, CA 95407

Re: Your Request for Advice  
Our File No. W-00-279

Dear Mr. Hilber:

This letter is in response to your request for formal written advice regarding the conflict of interest provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1 As presented, the subject of your request, James Paschal, has not specifically authorized you to seek direction regarding his duties under the Act, and under its provisions, the Commission is prohibited from giving third party advice (Regulation 18329(b)(2)(A)) or past conduct advice (Regulation 18329(b)(8)(A)).

I have enclosed a copy of Regulation 18329 for your review, along with a document entitled, "Filing A Complaint." Should you have any other questions regarding this matter, you may contact the Commission at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Fair Political Practices Commission

By: Joan Giannetta  
Staff Secretary, Legal Division

Enclosures

1 Government Code sections 81000 - 91014. Commission regulations appear at title 2, sections 18109 - 18995, of the California Code of Regulations.
